Exit Intent ‐ How to Leverage Existing Traffic for Email List Growth
MARK COMPLETE 	← PREVIOUS TOPIC 	NEXT TOPIC →
EXIT INTENT – HOW TO LEVERAGE EXISTING TRAFFIC FOR
EMAIL LIST GROWTH
Topic Progress:
In this lesson, I'll teach you how to harness the power of the exit intent pop-up. This
pop-up is an email form used to retain visitors that are going to leave your site.
Surprisingly, there are over a dozen flows that can be created from exit intent and
they've generated hundreds if not a few thousand dollars a month for my brands.
ACTION ITEM
Follow the steps outlined in the lesson to set up your exit intent pop-up and email
series.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
51 Exit Intent Pop-Ups, Examples, and Ideas for More Leads, Wishpond
10 Ways to Use Exit Intent Popups to Improve UX, Nielsen Norman Group
